reason: Top-level backend/spec index for repository conventions that the first-week foundation task will define.
Repository and module layout decisions are a core deliverable of this task.
Week-one setup must define project-wide error handling conventions for scripts and educational modules.
Week-one setup should define lightweight but consistent logging conventions.
Testing, linting, type checking, and review conventions must be established now.
The first-week design should centralize shared infrastructure instead of duplicating patterns across sections.
The repository plan needs clear boundaries between reusable package code, notebooks, docs, and curriculum modules.
